{{Infobox location
| name = Karosha
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Karosha Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Karosha refers to both a planet and its associated empire, which is currently undergoing an internal civil war. The [[Karoshan Empire]] includes the [[Visiria system]] and several other territories, forming a larger alliance. The ruling lineage has historically maintained a relationship with the planet's [[World Spirit]], and current leadership includes figures such as [[Queen Shyrax]] III, [[King Regent]] [[Felrex]], and various members of the royal house. The empire is known for its advanced technology, including massive space colonies shaped like black cubes, research outposts, and highly sophisticated military vessels ranging from blocky battlecruisers to six-mile-long dreadnoughts. Their military reputation is so formidable that [[Karoshan]] soldiers are often the subject of frightening legends among other galactic forces. The [[Karoshan people]] are physically distinct from humans, characterized by bronze-toned skin that is thicker than human skin and glowing hair composed of cables or strands in various colors like pink, green, bronze, or yellow. They are generally larger than humans, with some individuals reaching heights of nine to eleven feet. Due to their physical traits and restrained mannerisms, their facial expressions can be difficult for humans to interpret. Cultural traditions include specific hair fashions and ritualistic washing practices in the home. [[Karoshan]] society also places value on [[alchemy]] and maintains specialized roles such as Combat Artists and intelligence agents. The population tends to have a high birth rate, particularly among the nobility.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Karosha is a planet governed by the rule of a [[Queen]]. This realm is currently under the leadership of [[Shyrax the Third]], though [[Zorova]] departed from the planet one year ago. The throne of Karosha exists as an entity that the narrator is prepared to cooperate with.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The throne of [[Karosha]] is an entity the narrator is willing to cooperate with.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Karosha]] is a planet.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Karosha]] is a place ruled by a [[Queen]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c12">''The Captain'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Zorova]] left [[Karosha]] a year ago.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c35">''The Captain'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Shyrax the Third]] is the [[Queen of Karosha]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Karosha is a significant location home to a throne and the royal laboratories of the [[King Regent]]. Having once served as the place from which Shyrax was exiled, it is a territory that Shyrax's fleet must eventually retake. The former [[Queen of Karosha]] has become a suspect in the kidnapping of [[Doctor Nova]]. Furthermore, the [[Alliance]] maintains strict protocols regarding the site, requiring all visitors to travel there in person.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karosha]] is a place with a Throne.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c18">''The Engineer'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karosha]] is a location that Shyrax's fleet needs to retake.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The former [[Queen of Karosha]] is a suspect in [[Doctor Nova]]'s kidnapping.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karosha]] is a location the [[Alliance]] requires visitors to go to in person.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c32">''The Engineer'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karosha]] is a place from which Shyrax was exiled.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c50">''The Engineer'', chapter 50</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karosha]] has royal laboratories belonging to the [[King Regent]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c55">''The Engineer'', chapter 55</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Karosha is a major system that requires reclamation and serves as the realm of [[Queen Shyrax]]. Although [[the Perfected]] once resided there, they have since departed, and Shyrax's people have been away from the location for nearly two years. The system maintains rapid communication, with reports of interactions involving the Visirian planetary government reaching Karosha within an hour. Due to its significance, the system is considered a potential food source for the [[Swarm-Queen]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Karosha]] is a place that requires reclamation.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Interactions with the Visirian planetary government are reported to [[Karosha]] within an hour.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c13">''The Knight'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Shyrax's people have been away from [[Karosha]] for almost two years.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c23">''The Knight'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[The Perfected]] left [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c33">''The Knight'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Karosha]] is a major system that the [[Swarm-Queen]] might feed on.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Karosha]] is the realm of [[Queen Shyrax]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c36">''The Knight'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Karosha is a location governed by [[King Regent]] [[Felrex]], who maintains a royal palace within its borders. The region is home to a royal house and a [[Rebel Queen]], and it serves as the birthplace of [[Prince Veshran]]. Alchemy is a well-respected practice throughout the land, and the entity's affairs are subject to the potential influence of [[Union]] business.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Karosha]] is a location ruled by [[King Regent]] [[Felrex]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Alchemy is well-respected on [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c7">''The Pilot'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Karosha]] is the home of a [[Rebel Queen]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Shyrax has a royal palace on [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19">''The Pilot'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Prince Veshran]] is of [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20">''The Pilot'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Karosha]] has a royal house.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c21">''The Pilot'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Felrex]] is the [[King]]-[[Regent]] of [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Karosha]] is a group or entity that the [[Union]] business might affect.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36">''The Pilot'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[King]]-[[Regent]] [[Felrex]] has a royal palace on [[Karosha]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“This is Shyrax the Third, rightful Queen of Karosha, contacting The Last Horizon.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Its technology will be an invaluable tool in the reclamation of Karosha,” Shyrax agreed.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Rebel Queen of Karosha, your attack on the Dornoth system will not stand. The Lichborn are not your victims!”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|"Sister," said Prince Veshran of Karosha.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“They question how this Union business can be for the good of Karosha.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Nations and empires]]
